name: task-os
description: Personal task management system with Claude AI integration
author: Justin Handley

scripts.kill: pkill -9 -f 'Electron.app/Contents/MacOS/Electron' 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f 'electron electron-main.js' 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f 'node api.js' 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f 'node mcp/http-server.js' 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.electron-dev: npm run kill && sleep 1 && NODE_ENV=development concurrently --names api,mcp,vite,electron --prefix-colors blue,cyan,green,magenta "node api.js" "node mcp/http-server.js" "npm run dev --prefix ui" "./node_modules/.bin/electron electron-main.js"
scripts.restart: npm run kill && sleep 1 && NODE_ENV=development concurrently --names api,mcp,electron --prefix-colors blue,cyan,magenta "node api.js" "node mcp/http-server.js" "./node_modules/.bin/electron electron-main.js"
scripts.start: npm run kill && sleep 1 && NODE_ENV=production ./node_modules/.bin/electron electron-main.js
